readme.purpose: Non-portfolio income sources by year range. All amounts are in nominal dollars (today's dollars if year 1 is now).
readme.years_format: Use 'N-M' e.g. '1-5', '6-30'. Ranges must not overlap within a category. Missing years default to 0.
readme.amount_nom: Nominal dollar amount for that year range. Will be adjusted by inflation in the simulator.

income_types.w2: Wages, salary, self-employment income. Ordinary income. Subject to FICA if still working.
income_types.rental: Net rental income after expenses. Ordinary income.
income_types.interest: Taxable interest from bonds, CDs, savings. Ordinary income.
income_types.ordinary_other: Any other ordinary income not in another category (annuities, pension, etc.).
income_types.qualified_div: Qualified dividends. Taxed at LTCG rates (0/15/20%). Must meet holding period requirements.
income_types.cap_gains: External realized capital gains not from portfolio rebalancing. Taxed at LTCG rates. Portfolio rebalancing gains are computed separately.
